function normalizeCookie(cookie = {
    name: "",
    value: ""
}) {
    if (typeof cookie.expires === "number") {
        cookie.expires = new Date(cookie.expires);
    }
    if (cookie.maxAge) {
        cookie.expires = new Date(Date.now() + cookie.maxAge * 1e3);
    }
    if (cookie.path === null || cookie.path === void 0) {
        cookie.path = "/";

}
